posts.name: Alexandre Nikitenko
posts.text:
Dear experts,
I run MultiDimFit and my signal has parameters r, mean, width :
combine -M MultiDimFit 2018UL_dimuon_SR3.txt --algo fixed --fixedPointPOIs r=0 --redefineSignalPOIs r  --robustFit=1 --rMin 0 --rMax 120 -v3$
when it does the second fit with r=0  it fails to find minimum and got at error related to mean (which does not make a sence in case of r=0):
Info in MnHesse: 2nd derivative zero for Parameter  : name = mean
Info: MnHesse fails and will return diagonal matrix
VariableMetric: After Hessian   - FCN = -0.6067392287214 Edm =  6.29623e-05 NCalls =     80
VariableMetric: Iteration #   4 - FCN = -0.6067392287214 Edm =  6.29623e-05 NCalls =     80
Info in Minuit2Minimizer::Minimize : Minimization did NOT converge, Hesse is not valid
Minuit2Minimizer : Invalid Minimum - status = 2
Alyia advised me to fit it using command:
combine -M MultiDimFit 2018UL_dimuon_SR3.txt --algo fixed --fixedPointPOIs r=0,mean=25,width=0 --redefineSignalPOIs r,mean,width --robustFit=1 --rMin 0 --rMax 120 -v3
It works nice.
When I run on different Search Region

combine -M MultiDimFit 2018UL_dimuon_SR1.txt --algo fixed --fixedPointPOIs r=0 --redefineSignalPOIs r --robustFit=1 -v 3 --rMin 0 --rMax 120
I do not have an error in the second fit with r=0.  When I run using mean and width:

combine -M MultiDimFit 2018UL_dimuon_SR1.txt --algo fixed --fixedPointPOIs r=0,mean=25,width=0 --redefineSignalPOIs r,mean,width --robustFit=1 -v 3 --rMin 0 --rMax 120
it also run.  But what is a problem I see that in case 1 and 2 I got different NLL !
How can you explain it ?
Thanks, Sasha.
posts.cooked_html:
Dear experts,

I run MultiDimFit and my signal has parameters r, mean, width :

combine -M MultiDimFit 2018UL_dimuon_SR3.txt --algo fixed --fixedPointPOIs r=0 --redefineSignalPOIs r --robustFit=1 --rMin 0 --rMax 120 -v3$

when it does the second fit with r=0 it fails to find minimum and got at error related to mean (which does not make a sence in case of r=0):

Info in MnHesse: 2nd derivative zero for Parameter : name = mean
Info: MnHesse fails and will return diagonal matrix
VariableMetric: After Hessian - FCN = -0.6067392287214 Edm = 6.29623e-05 NCalls = 80
VariableMetric: Iteration # 4 - FCN = -0.6067392287214 Edm = 6.29623e-05 NCalls = 80
Info in Minuit2Minimizer::Minimize : Minimization did NOT converge, Hesse is not valid
Minuit2Minimizer : Invalid Minimum - status = 2

Alyia advised me to fit it using command:

combine -M MultiDimFit 2018UL_dimuon_SR3.txt --algo fixed --fixedPointPOIs r=0,mean=25,width=0 --redefineSignalPOIs r,mean,width --robustFit=1 --rMin 0 --rMax 120 -v3

It works nice.

When I run on different Search Region

combine -M MultiDimFit 2018UL_dimuon_SR1.txt --algo fixed --fixedPointPOIs r=0 --redefineSignalPOIs r --robustFit=1 -v 3 --rMin 0 --rMax 120

I do not have an error in the second fit with r=0. When I run using mean and width:

combine -M MultiDimFit 2018UL_dimuon_SR1.txt --algo fixed --fixedPointPOIs r=0,mean=25,width=0 --redefineSignalPOIs r,mean,width --robustFit=1 -v 3 --rMin 0 --rMax 120

it also run. But what is a problem I see that in case 1 and 2 I got different NLL !
How can you explain it ?

Thanks, Sasha.
